content_blocks.text:
Deploy to **Halibut** — that's your staging Kubernetes cluster.

Per your knowledge base, deploys are validated on Halibut (staging) and only promoted to Marlin (production) after passing there. There were no matching config files (`*.yaml`, `*.tf`, etc.) in the workspace to cross-check against, so this is based on the stored note alone — worth confirming against your live cluster contexts (`kubectl config get-contexts`) if you want to be certain.
